title: Add new key and never-expiring test certificate
body:
Former `domain.crt` was created with a one-year life and expired causing
all testing to fail.  Create a replacement, along with configuration and
documentation on how to make a new certificate if ever required.

fixes #2723

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude PTAL (cross-fingers) this should fix the podman push failures now and forever, then just in case new docs and a default cert. config. are there to assist.

LGTM if tests go green.
